---
title: "People"
---

The team behind the NSW Child E Cohort Program. *[Placeholder content — replace bios and photos with real team information.]*

## Program Lead

::: {.profile-card}
![](assets/images/avatar-placeholder.svg)

<div>
### Dr Kathleen Falster
<p class="role">Program Lead</p>
*[Placeholder bio — replace with a short biography, research interests, and links (e.g. UNSW profile, ORCID).]*
</div>
:::

## Investigators

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.profile-card}
![](assets/images/avatar-placeholder.svg)

<div>
### [Placeholder Name]
<p class="role">Chief Investigator</p>
*[Placeholder bio.]*
</div>
:::

::: {.profile-card}
![](assets/images/avatar-placeholder.svg)

<div>
### [Placeholder Name]
<p class="role">Associate Investigator</p>
*[Placeholder bio.]*
</div>
:::

:::

## Staff & Students

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.profile-card}
![](assets/images/avatar-placeholder.svg)

<div>
### [Placeholder Name]
<p class="role">Postdoctoral Fellow</p>
*[Placeholder bio.]*
</div>
:::

::: {.profile-card}
![](assets/images/avatar-placeholder.svg)

<div>
### [Placeholder Name]
<p class="role">PhD Candidate</p>
*[Placeholder bio.]*
</div>
:::

:::
